# `nise sync node`

- **Usage**: `nise sync node [FLAGS]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/sync/node.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/sync/node.rs)

Symlinks all tool versions from an external tool into nise

For example, use this to import all Homebrew node installs into nise

This won't overwrite any existing installs but will overwrite any existing symlinks

## Flags

### `--brew`

Get tool versions from Homebrew

### `--nodenv`

Get tool versions from nodenv

### `--nvm`

Get tool versions from nvm

Examples:

```
$ brew install node@18 node@20
$ nise sync node --brew
$ nise use -g node@18 - uses Homebrew-provided node
```
